metadata.name: ai.quickdeploy/google-trends-rss
metadata.title: Google Trends RSS
metadata.description: Generated feed-2-mcp MCP manifest for Google Trends RSS.

notes: Official, unauthenticated, publicly reachable Google Trends daily trending-searches RSS feed for the US region (geo=US). Verified live by direct fetch: valid RSS 2.0 document, root element <rss xmlns:ht="https://trends.google.com/trending/rss" version="2.0">, containing trending-search items with title, approx_traffic, and related news-article sub-elements.

No content digest is pinned: this is a live, continuously-updated feed (not a static document), so a fixed SHA-256 of the feed body would go stale immediately and would not meaningfully verify provenance. retrievedAt/sourceVersion record when and how the endpoint was verified instead.
The geo query parameter selects the trending-searches region; geo=US is the default region pinned for this catalog entry.

process: Run pnpm build/test scripts only inside OpenShell-backed MXC isolation
Run node only as invoked by generated project package scripts inside OpenShell-backed MXC isolation
